hero.subheadline: At Vader's Style, we craft styles that turn heads and boost confidence. From crisp men's fades and custom women's styling to patient kids' cuts — we deliver head-to-toe excellence.
hero.tagline: Open Weekly — Book anytime, day or night

services.title: Men's Grooming
services.description: Precision cuts & barbering. From sharp skin fades and beard sculpting to hot towel treatments and texturizing.

services.title: Women's Styling
services.description: Luxury hair & styling. Sleek silk presses, intricate braiding, custom wig installs, weaving, and color treatments.

services.title: Kids' Corner
services.description: Gentle kids' styling. Patient, professional trims, school braids, and gentle detangling for children.

services.title: General Services
services.description: Head-to-toe care. Pampering manicures, pedicures, rejuvenating facials, and grooming add-ons.
